metadata.description: Effect-TS architecture skills and mechanical enforcement for React + Effect apps.

plugins.name: effect-arch
plugins.description: Guidance skills for a layered Effect-TS architecture in React apps: architecture hub, data fetching, and testing, plus a semantic architecture-review command. Installs anywhere; touches nothing.

plugins.name: effect-arch-enforcement
plugins.description: Optional mechanical enforcement for the effect-arch rules: an edit-time lint hook plus a repo setup/doctor command that wires eslint-plugin-effect-arch and dependency-cruiser into a target repo.
